name: cerebellum and brainstem volumes
description: Quantitative assessment of cerebellar hemispheres and brainstem.

attributes.name: cerebellum volume (left)
attributes.description: Volume of left cerebellar hemisphere, clinically relevant for posterior fossa integrity.

attributes.name: cerebellum volume (right)
attributes.description: Volume of right cerebellar hemisphere, clinically relevant for posterior fossa integrity.

attributes.name: brainstem volume
attributes.description: Volume of brainstem, clinically relevant for neurodegenerative and demyelinating disorders.
